citations.claim: The component is named 'web' and uses Next.js 16 as its core framework
Uses layered architecture with AppShell, authentication providers, and theme management
Implements Darkbloom AI assistant with hardware attestation and end-to-end encryption
Uses Zustand for state management with persistent chat history and model selection
Supports optional NaCl Box encryption for sender-coordinator privacy
Implements X25519 NaCl Box encryption with ephemeral keypairs for forward secrecy
Auto-provisions API keys via Privy tokens and handles token refresh
Performs in-browser X.509 certificate verification against Apple Enterprise Attestation Root CA
Next.js API routes act as proxies with streaming support and header passthrough
AppShell provides main layout with sidebar and authentication-aware rendering
Runtime dependencies include Next.js, React 19, Privy auth, NaCl crypto, and pkijs
Extracts trust metadata from response headers for hardware attestation display
ChatMessage component renders markdown with thinking blocks and trust indicators
API key provisioning route supports both Authorization header and Privy token cookie
Browser-side telemetry client sends debounced event batches to coordinator
Testing setup uses Vitest with jsdom environment and TypeScript path aliases
Uses EigenCloud brand design system with custom CSS variables for theming
Sidebar provides navigation for chat, stats, provider dashboard, earnings, and API console
Provider dashboard integrates with coordinator API for machine status and earnings
Streaming chat supports encrypted SSE events with response unsealing
